[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001101 3
1 1011101 5
2 0010100 2
3 0010110 3
4 0001101 3
5 0000100 1
6 1010001 3
7 0100110 3

01 1100011 4
12 0001010 2
23 1100011 4
34 1010111 5
45 0101010 3
56 0001000 1
67 1111000 4
70 0000111 3

24 1001011 4
35 0000010 1
46 1011101 5 match 1
57 0001111 4
60 0000000 a
71 0011011 4
